articles.title: 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.snippet: # 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years. A decade after “Location” launched him to stardom, Khalid is looking back on the song that changed his life. The Grammy-nominated Texas singer, whose full name is Khalid Donnel Robinson, broke through in the late 2010s with a string of introspective pop hits. Last summer, the singer gave local fans a first listen to his fourth studio album, “After the Sun Goes Down,” during an afternoon performance at San Francisco’s Golden Gate Park one day after its release. On Friday, June 26, Khalid returns to the Bay Area, this time across the Bay Bridge for a concert at the Greek Theatre in Berkeley as part of his It’s Always Summer Somewhere Tour — his first in six years. After going TikTok viral, this rising pop star is coming to S.F. One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner. articles.snippet: Email&body=Here%20is%20a%20story%20that%20I%20thought%20would%20interest%20you.%0D%0A%0D%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fnews.bloomberglaw.com%2Flitigation%2Fuber-avoids-california-ballot-war-as-governor-signs-lawyers-deal%3Futm_source%3DEmail_Share). # Uber Avoids California Ballot War With Signed Lawyer Deal (1). A legislative agreement brokered by Uber Technologies Inc. and the Consumer Attorneys of California to end an expensive ballot measure battle was signed into law Thursday by Gov. Gavin Newsom. In response to the new law, both parties have pulled their respective initiatives from the ballot, which would have asked California voters in November to decide major policy questions about car accident contingency fees and liability for Uber driver sexual assaults. Each campaign had already spent over $70 million on their respective initiatives before qualifying for the ballot earlier this month. articles.title: How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’ - Defector
articles.snippet: # How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’. If you went back in time to New York in the early '90s, not a soul would believe you if you told them Jay-Z would end up where he is today. Jay-Z's relatively delayed breakthrough made him something of a late bloomer, even in an era when stars weren't minted as quickly and early as they are now. It took him a while to figure out how to be himself on wax. It was his big homie Jaz-O who put him on, and the two of them had a Das EFX, Fu-Schnickens fast-rapping style that was as technically impressive as it was uninteresting. Instead it's the Jay we're a lot more familiar with: not just the hustler, but the boss. Aside from the rapping itself, a big part of why *Reasonable Doubt* resonates so much still is that it was what we would call today an exercise in personal branding.

articles.title: Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates 'Reasonable Doubt' 30th Anniversary in New York City - Just Jared
articles.snippet: # Beyoncé Joins Jay-Z as He Celebrates ‘Reasonable Doubt’ 30th Anniversary in New York City. **Beyoncé** is making a rare appearance to support husband **Jay-Z**! The 44-year-old “Alien Superstar” singer and the 56-year-old “Young Forever” rapper left his Roc Nation office building on Thursday night (June 25) in New York City. Earlier that day, **Jay** and the couple’s 14-year-old daughter **Blue Ivy Carter** stopped by his ***Reasonable Doubt Jay-Z30*** pop-up event to celebrated the 30th anniversary of his landmark debut album *Reasonable Doubt*, which he dropped back on June 25, 1996. In celebration of of the 30th anniversary of his debut album, along with the 25th anniversary of his *The Blueprint* album, **Jay** will be playing a trio of shows at Yankee Stadium in July, plus a finale concert called “Extra Innings.” He’ll then be heading to Paris and then Los Angeles for more anniversary shows! ***Browse through the gallery below for more photos of Beyoncé and Jay-Z in NYC…***.

articles.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses Oscar-Winner to Become Highest Grossing Biopic - Newsweek
articles.snippet: Michael Jackson was not only the King of Pop, he's also proving to be the King of the box-office. Almost two decades after his death, Jackson's biopic, "Michael" is creating history at the box-office while being set to touch the coveted $1 billion mark. As per the latest reports, "Michael" has also created history by becoming the highest grossing biopic of all time, dethroning Christopher Nolan's Oscar-winning 2023 mega-project "Oppenheimer.". The King of Pop's real-life nephew, Jaafar Jackson, portrays the role of Michael Jackson for the biopic. Despite the envious box-office numbers, the film opened to a moderate critics rating, as the Tomatometer rates the film at 38%. Despite the difference in the certifications of the two movies with "Michael" getting a PG-13, and Cillian Murphy-starrer "Oppenheimer" an R, the relevance of the "Thriller" hitmaker's biopic cannot be ignored. However, notwithstanding the criticism, the film is still doing well at the box-office, and on its way to grossing $1 billion.

articles.title: Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’ - The Standard (HK)
articles.snippet: # Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’. Rising singer-songwriter Jasmine Yen has marked her return to the music scene with the release of her latest single, “Roll With Me,” a bold and empowering anthem that signals a fresh, independent chapter in her burgeoning career. Yen uses a playful vocal delivery and distinct charisma to champion individuality and unfiltered self-expression, dedicating the project to a new era defined by complete creative freedom. Following the release, she took to social media to express gratitude to her creative team and her family, whom she credited as her ultimate source of support. A natural talent who began songwriting at just seven years old, the introverted artist turned to music as her primary emotional outlet, a passion that eventually earned her a scholarship to the prestigious Berklee College of Music. “Roll With Me” serves as the opening chapter of her new artistic journey, leaving fans highly expectant for her upcoming body of work.

His transformation from child star to well-rounded entertainer serves as a blueprint for longevity, and honoring the impact and legacy of BET without him would have been incomplete. It's a loyalty that Bow Wow earned, and he basks in that glory as he blazes through his Tiny Desk concert full of back-to-back hits. The decades of dedication to his craft were evident in the cadence, stage presence and high-energy infused in performances of "Shortie Like Mine," "Fresh Azimiz" and "Let Me Hold You." articles.title: Michael overtakes Oppenheimer as highest-grossing biopic worldwide - BBC
articles.snippet: # Michael Jackson movie becomes highest-grossing biopic of all time. **The recently released Michael Jackson movie has overtaken Oppenheimer as the highest-grossing biopic of all time, after taking $977m (£739m) at the worldwide box office.**. But it has now also surpassed director Christopher Nolan's 2023 film about the American theoretical physicist J Robert Oppenheimer, which previously held the box office record for any film based on a real-life figure. Directed by Antoine Fuqua, Michael tells the story of the late US singer's journey from being a child star in family group the Jackson 5, to becoming the solo King of Pop. Jaafar Jackson, the singer's real-life nephew, plays the titular role, with Colman Domingo and Nia Long portraying his parents. Michael has clearly been a huge hit with the performer's many fans around the world, for its study of his childhood and recreations of famous concert performances and music videos.

articles.snippet: # Inside the wild, black-tie ‘Jackass’ premiere with lewd pasta, outrageous drone show and ‘butt-shaped’ ice luge. The “Jackass” crew bid farewell to their chaotic franchise at the premiere of their final film on Wednesday night. The Paramount Theater on the studio’s Hollywood lot was decked out for the black-tie optional “Jackass: Best and Last” premiere, with candelabras, elegant floral arrangements and even a grand piano — where a tatted guy in tighty whities and angel wings played classical interpretations of hits by **Zara Larsson**, **Rihanna** and more. “Jackass: Best and Last” is a love letter to stupidity, and played exceptionally well to the packed crowd with lots of groaning, gagging, eye-covering, wincing, and of course, laughing, in the auditorium. The cast — including Knoxville, **Steve-O**, **Ehren “Danger” McGhehey** (plus his tuxedo-clad dog, **Bugsy**), and **Jason “Wee Man” Acuña** — gathered at the heart of the party to watch a show-stopping drone show. The premiere party featured a wild drone show.

articles.title: Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia Appoints New Division Chief of Hematology - BioSpace
articles.snippet: # Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia Appoints New Division Chief of Hematology. PHILADELPHIA, July 1, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) is proud to announce the selection of Stella T. Chou, MD, as its new Chief of the Division of Hematology. Dr. Chou served as interim chief since August 2025 and will officially assume the role July 1, leading one of the nation's largest and highly ranked pediatric hematology programs. As a physician scientist, Dr. Chou has dedicated her career to advancing innovative research in sickle cell disease, transfusion medicine and blood cell development. "I am honored to lead our outstanding Division of Hematology," said Dr. Chou, who also serves as Professor of Pediatrics at the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania and Chief of the Division of Transfusion Medicine at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. Orange, MD, PhD, Pediatrician-in-Chief and Chair of the Department of Pediatrics at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. **About Children's Hospital of Philadelphia:**.

articles.title: 'Köln 75' review: The story behind jazz's most famous concert - The Jerusalem Post
articles.snippet: For jazz aficionados, the title of the movie, *Köln 75*, says it all. They will know that it refers to a concert by Keith Jarrett, an improvisation that was recorded and became the bestselling solo jazz record of all time. Jazz buffs will certainly want to see this movie, which opens in theaters across Israel on Thursday, but it isn’t only for those who are into improvisational jazz. It’s about a love for music more than it is about music itself, and it’s a tale of a magnificent obsession. The movie opens at Vera’s 50th birthday party, where she is surrounded by affectionate friends, but the event is marred by the presence of her judgmental, cold father, who never saw anything of value in her life’s work of promoting and arranging jazz concerts. Vera falls in love with the music, not the man, and she has one goal from then on: To book a major concert for Jarrett in Köln.
articles.summary: 'Köln 75' review: The story behind jazz's most famous concert - The Jerusalem Post

articles.title: Jalen Brunson, NBA champion Knicks score invites to Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce MSG wedding - New York Post
articles.snippet: # Jalen Brunson, NBA champion Knicks score invites to Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce MSG wedding. The Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce Garden party might include, well, some of the championship tenants of MSG. Jalen Brunson and “the starting lineup for the Knicks” have been invited to the power couple’s wedding on Friday in New York, Page Six reported. Swift and the Knicks are plenty familiar with each other, as the “Welcome to New York” singer took in the Knicks’ historic 29-point comeback in Game 4 of the NBA Finals. Swift, who wore a blue and orange “Stevie Knicks” T-shirt, was sitting courtside on Celebrity Row with fellow singers Este Haim and Alana Haim and “Law and Order: Special Victims Unit” actress Mariska Hargitay as the Knicks improbably rallied to win their third game of the Finals. The Haim sisters, along with Hargitay, are among the other high-profile guests invited to the big bash, according to Page Six. Some of Kelce’s Chiefs teammates are expected to attend.

articles.title: Pop star Jay Chou’s Matisse dream comes true with $20m purchase - The Art Newspaper
articles.snippet: # Pop star Jay Chou’s Matisse dream comes true with $20m purchase. ## The Taiwanese musician has fulfilled a long-held ambition to own a work by the French artist, buying a painting at Sotheby’s New York. The Taiwanese pop star Jay Chou is making his mark in the art world, posting on social media that he was the winning bidder for the 1924 Henri Matisse painting, *La Séance du Matin*, which sold for $20m (with fees) at Sotheby’s New York in June. In a wistful Instagram post, Chou recalled that when he was in Nice in the south of France, he would often stand outside Matisse’s former home, imagining the French artist looking out from his balcony. “I also used to dream about one day being able to collect one of his works from that period in Nice. Never thought that today the dream would actually come true,” he wrote. It’s turned into a sunny day indeed for Chou.
articles.summary: Pop star Jay Chou’s Matisse dream comes true with $20m purchase - The Art Newspaper

articles.title: CohnReznick adds Jenn Chou as tax partner in San Francisco - Consulting.us
articles.snippet: # CohnReznick adds Jenn Chou as tax partner in San Francisco. ***CohnReznick, a New York-headquartered accounting and consulting firm, has hired Jenn Chou as a tax partner in its asset management and financial services sector practice.***. Based in San Francisco, Chou is a certified public accountant and tax executive with nearly two decades of experience. In her new role with CohnReznick, Chou will provide tax compliance and consulting services to alternative investment fund clients – including venture capital, private equity, and fund-of-funds. “When CohnReznick opened its San Francisco office in 2025, we made a commitment to the Bay Area investment community to deliver the talent, resources, and tech-enabled strategies that would drive value for them throughout the investment lifecycle,” said Angela Ty, CohnReznick’s San Francisco market leader. Chou joins from tax consultancy Andersen, where she spent three years as a managing director in the alternative investment funds group. CohnReznick is the 14th-largest CPA firm in the US, according to Inside Public Accounting, with annual revenue of $1.15 billion.
articles.summary: CohnReznick adds Jenn Chou as tax partner in San Francisco - Consulting.us

articles.title: Mayor Parker changed things up for this year’s July 4th concert — and it’s costing Philly’s taxpayers millions more - Inquirer.com
articles.snippet: The city is due to pay ESM Productions about $15.5 million for the show, which will be headlined by Christina Aguilera, Jill Scott, The Roots, and features Meek Mill. Parker’s administration this year took over management of the city’s free July Fourth concert, which for years was produced by a nonprofit established by the city, Welcome America. The mayor instead hired ESM Productions, a for-profit company, to put on the annual show featuring musical acts and fireworks over the Ben Franklin Parkway, and she changed the name from Wawa Welcome America to the “One Philly: Unity Concert for America” — a version of Parker’s well-known slogan, “One Philly: A United City.”. The city is due to pay ESM Productions about $15.5 million for the show, which will be headlined by Christina Aguilera, Jill Scott, and The Roots and will feature rapper Meek Mill, according to a copy of the city’s contract paperwork with ESM, obtained by The Inquirer.

articles.title: The New Jackass Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End - Kotaku
articles.snippet: # The New *Jackass* Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End. *Jackass: Best and Last* is like a perfect greatest-hits album designed for longtime fans of the series. There’s a moment at the very end of *Jackass: Best and Last* that stuck with me. It’s a moment that would have felt out of place in an earlier *Jackass* movie, but here, after 25 years, a TV show, and over a half dozen films and spin-off movies, the franchise and its injured stars have earned this tender moment. And as usual, with this new film, *Jackass* does something few other Hollywood franchises do anymore: end gracefully, on the terms of the creators, and in a way that feels perfect and satisfying. *Best and Last* is less a movie and more a visual greatest-hits album, and like the best of those albums, it mixes in new and old content to create something both retrospective and celebratory.
articles.summary: The New Jackass Movie Does Something Hollywood Franchises Never Do Anymore: Say Goodbye And End - Kotaku

articles.title: Bob Seger tribute band to play Lexington park concert - Times Herald
articles.snippet: # Bob Seger tribute band to play Lexington park concert. A Bob Seger tribute band is set to take the stage as part of a summer concert series in Lexington. KatMandu will perform at 7:30 p.m. July 17 at Patrick Tierney Memorial Park, according to a community announcement. The concert is part of the Lexington Arts Council’s “Music in the Park” series and is sponsored by Stifel. The band is described as a longtime Michigan-based group that celebrates the music of Rock and Roll Hall of Fame artist Bob Seger, according to the announcement. The show will take place at Patrick Tierney Memorial Park, two blocks east of the village traffic light in Lexington. Food and refreshments will be available nearby, and visitors can stop at local establishments before heading to the concert. Additional parking options and a free shuttle service will be provided throughout the village. * St. Matthew Lutheran Church, 7155 Huron Ave. More information about the event is available at lexington-arts.org.

articles.title: Why Jalen Brunson’s New Children’s Book Makes Me So Emotional - HuffPost
articles.snippet: Part of HuffPost Black Voices. # My Son Found A Hero In Jalen Brunson. “Jalen Plays It All” has been announced at the perfect moment for a 5-year-old superfan and a grandfather’s legacy waiting to be passed down. Growing up in New York City meant that I was constantly surrounded by Knicks fans — and my father was a particularly influential one in my life. But when I had my son, Zakai, I suspected that he’d inherit my dad’s passion for our home team. While he now has his dad, who is also a Knicks superfan, to teach him all about the game’s history and technical aspects, it has been heartwarming to see Brunson open up a new world to my son. And so, I can’t wait to get our copy of “Jalen Plays It All” and read it to him with all of the enthusiasm and pride that my father would.
articles.summary: Why Jalen Brunson’s New Children’s Book Makes Me So Emotional - HuffPost

While he now has his dad, who is also a Knicks superfan, to teach him all about the game's history and technical aspects, it has been heartwarming to see Brunson open up a new world to my son. articles.snippet: # MONSTA X’s Kihyun Has Been Everywhere But Now Is At The ‘BORDERLINE’. Now in his 30s and with over 10 years in the music industry, he’s ready to show a deeper, more mature side of himself with his new EP, *BORDERLINE*. The concepts shown for *BORDERLINE* with Kihyun at the airport and surrounded by travel elements make so much sense, as he’s become so worldly throughout his young life. The seven-track pop-rock-driven EP isn’t so much about his youth and the nostalgia behind it as about the complex road he’s on now. Known best to his fans as the gentleman of the group (all of them are, but Kihyun is so fancy), he has always been seen as the level-headed one who seems to know what he’s doing or where he’s headed.

articles.title: Jermaine Dupri Sues Sony Music for $18 Million Over Unpaid Mariah Carey, Usher Royalties - Variety
articles.snippet: *   Plus Icon What To Watch. *   Plus Icon What To Hear. Plus Icon Click to expand the Mega Menu. Jermaine Dupri has filed an $18 million lawsuit against Sony Music Entertainment, alleging that the company failed to properly pay royalties for releases from Mariah Carey, Usher, Xscape, Kris Kross and more. The suit, filed on Monday and reviewed by _Variety_, accuses SME of having “not been lawful” in its dealings with Dupri dating back to May 1992, when his imprint So-So Def Entertainment entered into an agreement with the company. Dupri’s attorneys detail a long pattern of unpaid royalties, including $960,000 in unpaid producer royalties for Xscape’s “Hummin’ Comin’ At ‘Cha” and over $1 million for Da Brat’s “Funkdafied.” The suit also claims there were understated royalties payable to So-So Def in connection with albums released by Carey, Bow Wow, Usher, J-Kwon, Dupri and Bone Crusher.
articles.summary: Jermaine Dupri Sues Sony Music for $18 Million Over Unpaid Mariah Carey, Usher Royalties - Variety

articles.title: Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her son — the singer’s godson — is left out of MSG wedding - Page Six
articles.snippet: ##### Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her... # Jaime King reveals status of Taylor Swift friendship after her son — the singer’s godson — is left out of MSG wedding. The actress is addressing speculation surrounding her relationship with Taylor Swift after her son — the pop star’s godson, 10-year-old Leo Newman — was not among the children at Swift’s star-studded wedding to Travis Kelce last week. “The reason Jaime chose Taylor as Leo Thames’s godmother is because they both believe that being a godmother is a deeply personal and spiritual commitment that has nothing to do with public appearances,” King’s publicist, Jane Owen, exclusively told Page Six. The statement comes one day after Page Six exclusively reported that none of Swift’s five godchildren — including Leo — attended the singer’s wedding festivities with Kelce. “Jaime made Taylor her son’s godmother for a reason and she wants to continue that friendship,” the source said at the time.

articles.title: NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song - The Korea Herald
articles.snippet: # NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song. Add The Korea Herald on Google. Jaehyun of NCT is releasing the solo single “99 Degrees” online on Friday, label SM Entertainment said. A music video will support the single, and the trailer unveiled Thursday highlighted different sides of the idol, from the shining star on stage to a casual self rambling on streets. The single comes after his five-city solo fan concert tour across Asia, which concluded last week. The overseas trip marked his first reunion with fans in the region since he was discharged from the military in May. Jaehyun, along with four members of NCT127, will bring out their seventh LP on Aug. 24, and will have a concert in Seoul the following month. SK hynix seals $26.5b Nasdaq listing, world's biggest offering since SpaceX. SK hynix has priced its Nasdaq offering of American depositary receipts at $149 apiece, setting the deal at about $26.5 billion.
articles.summary: NCT’s Jaehyun drops self-written song - The Korea Herald

articles.snippet: # Micro LED CPO“光进铜退”加速器？Micro LED光模块开启数据中心光互连新局！附股）. 光进铜退Micro LED CPO光互连，根据TrendForce集邦咨询最新调查，随着生成式AI兴起，数据中心对高速传输的需求持续提升，原先应用在机柜内(Intra-Rack)短距传输的铜缆方案，将在传输密度与节能上面临严峻挑战。相比之下，Micro LED CPO方案的单位传输能耗较低，可大幅降低整体能耗至铜缆方案的5%，有望凭节能优势成为光互连替代方案。. 光进铜退Micro LED CPO是一种将Micro LED芯片与AI计算芯片（如ASIC）通过先进封装技术集成的新型光互连方案。其核心是通过Micro LED替代传统铜缆或激光器作为光源，实现芯片级光信号传输，突破传统光模块的物理限制，满足AI数据中心对高密度、低延迟、低功耗的严苛需求。. 天风证券表示，当今数据中心网络中的链路技术必须在传输距离、功耗和可靠性之间做出根本性权衡。铜缆链路能效高且可靠性强，但传输距离极为有限（<2m），若使用有源铜缆，传输距离预计提升至5-7m，但随着带宽速率进一步提升，对铜缆传输距离的挑战将进一步加大。光链路可提供更长的传输距离，却以高功耗和较低可靠性为代价。随着网络速度的提升（1.6T/3.2T），这种权衡关系愈发显著，制约着未来的可扩展性。. Micro LED的制造面临量产难、巨量转移技术难度大、高昂成本、产业链配套等诸多问题，不过在2025年，Micro LED行业巨量转移良率问题得到解决，比如Q-Pixel发布Q-Transfer技术实现超过99.9995%的转移良率。2025年9月，佳明推出全球首款Micro LED智能手表Fenix 8 Pro，表明Micro LED技术在智能手表上已具备商业化能力。此外AI数据中心光互连也有着巨大吸引，国泰海通认为Micro LED行业已迎来涅槃重生，并有望在未来不断扩大应用场景、市场规模。. 随着应用场景的不断扩大，市场对于Micro LED的市场空间也充满了乐观预期。根据Omdia数据，2025年Micro LED显示器收入为5240万美元，预计2026年将增长至1.05亿美元，同比增幅达100%。. TrendForce集邦咨询预测，Micro LED显示应用芯片产值将从2024年的基数快速攀升，预计2029年达7.4亿美元，2024-2029年复合增长率达93% 。. 更远点看，Omdia预计，到2032年Micro LED显示器市场规模将扩大至68亿美元，占平板显示器市场总额的4.4% 。. 兆驰股份：Micro LED全产业链；外延/芯片/封装，具备CPO技术迁移能力。. 聚飞光电：Micro LED+Mini LED+CPO；参股熹联光芯（硅光芯片用于CPO），自身有光模块封装。公司的主营业务为LED封装，MicroLED是LED发展的最终形态，具有小型化，低功耗等优点。公司的MicroLED产品主要应用于显示终端，收入占比较低。目前公司MicroLED技术未应用于CPO领域，也未因CPO产生收入。. 沃格光电：玻璃基板叠加Mini/Micro LED，沃格光电2023年半年报显示，近三年，公司已与多家行业知名企业开展玻璃基在 Mini / Micro 直显产品的合作开发应用,目前有多个项目在开展。. 京东方A：2020年报显示公司已积极进行Mini/Macro LED研发与产品布局，无疑是Macro LED产业链第一梯队。. TCL科技：2021年7月12日回复称公司针对Micro-LED显示技术持续投入,与三安成立联合实验室聚焦Micro-LED技术开发,推动公司在该领域从材料、工艺、设备、产线方案到自主知识产权的生态布局,并形成Micro-LED商业化规模量产的工艺流程解决方案。. 维信诺：2021年8月5日回复称公司参股公司成都辰显光电近日成功点亮326ppi的1.84英寸Micro-LED可穿戴产品。成都辰显光电是公司与成都国资投资平台共同投资设立的MicroLED项目运营主体,围绕巨量转移、驱动与检测、芯片设计、彩色化等关键技术展开研发、生产工作。. 利亚德：其无锡的子公司，利晶微是和台湾晶元光电合资的企业，主要是Micro LED的全流程产线，厦门是利亚德全资的二期产线，正在建设。参股 赛富乐斯（Saphlux），获得其 NPQD 量子点红光 Micro LED 芯片的独家供应权，目前来说利亚德的核心优势就是Micro LED 的封装巨量转移技术，这个目前只有利亚德是唯一成熟的几年的产线经验了。. $华灿光电(SZ300323)$$TCL科技(SZ000100)$$三安光电(SH600703)$. #炒股日记##机构：Micro LED CPO开启数据中心互连新局#. **郑重声明：**用户在社区发表的所有信息将由本网站记录保存，仅代表作者个人观点，与本网站立场无关，不对您构成任何投资建议，据此操作风险自担。**请勿相信代客理财、免费荐股和炒股培训等宣传内容，远离非法证券活动。请勿添加发言用户的手机号码、公众号、微博、微信及QQ等信息，谨防上当受骗！**. 郑重声明：东方财富网发布此信息的目的在于传播更多信息，与本站立场无关。东方财富网不保证该信息（包括但不限于文字、视频、音频、数据及图表）全部或者部分内容的准确性、真实性、完整性、有效性、及时性、原创性等。相关信息并未经过本网站证实，不对您构成任何投资建议，据此操作，风险自担。. 信息网络传播视听节目许可证：0908328号 经营证券期货业务许可证编号：913101046312860336 违法和不良信息举报:021-61278686 举报邮箱：jubao@eastmoney.com. 沪ICP证:沪B2-20070217 网站备案号:沪ICP备05006054号-11  沪公网安备 31010402000120号 版权所有:东方财富网 意见与建议:4000300059/952500.

articles.snippet: # Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man. Jason Kelce finally shared his opinion on Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 3 wedding, during which he acted as his brother's Best Man while Austin Swift was his sister's Man of Honor. Watch: Jason Kelce Breaks Silence on Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding After Serving as Best Man. The former Philadelphia Eagles center finally spilled the beans—albeit still very few—on his experience inside Madison Square Garden for his brother **Travis Kelce**’s July 3 wedding to **Taylor Swift**, during which Jason acted as Travis' Best Man while **Austin Swift** served as Taylor's Man of Honor. Since the start of Travis and Taylor’s love story, Jason and his wife **Kylie Kelce**—who are parents to daughters **Wyatt**, 6, **Elliotte**, 5, **Bennett**, 3 and **Finnley**, 16 months—have been two of the couple’s biggest cheer captains. For more about how Taylor and Travis took their wedding day to new heights, keep reading.

articles.title: Paris Jackson on the Perfume Oil That Reminds Her of Her Father - Vogue
articles.snippet: # Paris Jackson on the Saffron Scent That Reminds Her of Her Father. Paris Jackson is truly showing us her daily routine: get dressed, do some light glam, go to the studio, work on her music. This is truly a moment to celebrate for the singer because there was a time when she was scared of doing music. “In my early 20s, I realized I couldn’t do this anymore—it’s what makes me happy...especially because this was before I found out all the other things that made me happy. The musician starts with her hair: She doesn’t wash it every day, but has a several-step routine that’s focused on growth and strength. “I buzzed my hair just over 10 years ago, and I realized in the last few years that constantly bleaching and straightening it was not helping it get longer,” she says with a shrug. “I started taking care of my skin a few years ago,” Jackson says, “I was just doing it wrong.
articles.summary: Paris Jackson on the Perfume Oil That Reminds Her of Her Father - Vogue

articles.title: Kristin Cavallari Says She Makes Her Kids Fly Coach Because It’s "Good for Them" - E! News
articles.snippet: # Kristin Cavallari Says She Makes Her Kids Fly Coach Because It’s "Good for Them". Kristin Cavallari explained why she makes her and ex-husband Jay Cutler’s three kids sit in coach while she travels in first class: “If they want something, they have to work for it.”. Watch: Why Kristin Cavallari Says She Makes Her Kids Fly Coach While She's in First Class. Indeed, the *Very Cavallari* star shared that in an effort to teach her and ex **Jay Cutler**’s kids **Camden Jack**, 13, **Jaxon**, 12, and **Saylor**, 10, about the value of money, she has them fly in coach while she travels in first class. “And if they want something, they have to work for it.”. Kristin Cavallari Says She Gave Jay Cutler "Half the Value" of Her Company in Divorce. Plus, the *Laguna Beach* alum is encouraging her kids to learn entrepreneurship because, as she put it, “This is my money. Because if they want something, they got to go work for it.
articles.summary: Kristin Cavallari Says She Makes Her Kids Fly Coach Because It’s "Good for Them" - E! News

articles.title: Jay-Z Reasonable Doubt at 30: Beyoncé & Nas at Yankee Stadium - Lower Bucks Times
articles.snippet: HomeEntertainmentJay-Z Brought Out Beyoncé, Blue Ivy and Nas for Reasonable Doubt at... # Jay-Z Brought Out Beyoncé, Blue Ivy and Nas for Reasonable Doubt at 30, and Yankee Stadium Lost Its Mind. Jay-Z’s Reasonable Doubt 30th anniversary concert at Yankee Stadium was billed as a victory lap for one man, and it turned into the biggest family reunion hip-hop has staged in years. On Friday, July 10, the rapper born Shawn Carter walked out into the Bronx ballpark to play his 1996 debut front to back, and by the end of the night he had shared the stage with his wife, his oldest daughter, his fiercest one-time rival and one of the most famous voices in New York music. It was the first of three sold-out shows, and it set a bar that will be hard to top. On this night, roughly 45,000 people paid to hear every word of it, and Jay-Z spent the evening reminding them how far that record traveled.
articles.summary: Jay-Z Reasonable Doubt at 30: Beyoncé & Nas at Yankee Stadium - Lower Bucks Times

articles.title: Jay-Z Brings Out Beyoncé, Blue Ivy Carter at Yankee Stadium - Variety
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z Brings Out Beyoncé, Blue Ivy Carter, Nas, Alicia Keys and More for ‘Reasonable Doubt’ 30th Anniversary Show at Yankee Stadium. That didn’t stop him from pulling out all the stops — well, most of them, at least — during the first of his three headlining shows at Yankee Stadium on Friday night, setting off a string of performances to commemorate a pair of milestones (the other being the 25th anniversary of “The Blueprint”) plus a bonus show billed as “Extra Innings” that, as of now, has a stadium-sized question mark hanging over what it will actually be. For his “Reasonable Doubt” show, it wasn’t entirely off-script — every song from the record was performed in one way or another — yet he turned the night into a Jay-Z history lesson, weaving in bits and bobs from other hits and bringing out a murderer’s row of guests spanning his family (Beyoncé, Blue Ivy Carter) to friends and former foes (Nas, Jaz-O) in an effort to round out the world he’d built three decades ago.
articles.summary: Jay-Z Brings Out Beyoncé, Blue Ivy Carter at Yankee Stadium - Variety

articles.title: Taylor Swift Is Officially an Aunt to Travis Kelce’s Nieces—and She’s Ready for It - E! News
articles.snippet: # Taylor Swift Is Officially an Aunt to Travis Kelce’s Nieces—and She’s Ready for It. When Taylor Swift wed Travis Kelce at MSG on July 3, she officially became an aunt to his nieces Wyatt, Elliotte, Bennett and Finnley—Jason Kelce and Kylie Kelce's daughters. Watch: The Role Jason Kelce's Kids Played in Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift Wedding. Because it was recently revealed that **Jason Kelce** and **Kylie Kelce**’s daughters—**Wyatt Kelce**, 6, **Elliotte Kelce**, 5, **Bennett Kelce**, 3, and **Finnley Kelce**, 15 months—were the flower girls at their uncle **Travis Kelce**’s wedding to **Taylor Swift**. Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce Wedding: All the Celebrity Guests. "I just enjoy her being my brother’s soon-to-be wife, and aunt to my kids," the former Philadelphia Eagles player told *The Wall Street Journal* in December, "and we try to leave that relationship where it should be, there.". And you can call it what you want, but Jason and Kylie's daughters have a specific name for the game they like to play with their aunt and uncle.
articles.summary: Taylor Swift Is Officially an Aunt to Travis Kelce’s Nieces—and She’s Ready for It - E! News

articles.title: Why Michael Jackson’s daughter, Paris, won’t stop ‘til she gets enough from his estate - Yahoo
articles.snippet: She is asking a court to take a closer look at how the pop icon's estate is being handled by its executors – the people responsible for managing it. Paris Jackson has accused executors John Branca and John McClain of paying themselves and the estate's lawyers too much, and for leaving $464 million owned by the estate uninvested. Paris Jackson also has accused Branca of misusing his position as producer of "Michael," an upcoming Michael Jackson biopic reportedly financed by Jackson's estate, to cast an A-list celebrity – Miles Teller – to play the role of Branca himself in the film. As law professors who study the transfer of property after death, we find that when disputes over inherited wealth become national news, they are often difficult to understand because this type of legal process is obscure and most people never interact directly with the probate court system.
articles.summary: Why Michael Jackson’s daughter, Paris, won’t stop ‘til she gets enough from his estate - Yahoo

articles.title: Jay-Z Celebrates ‘The Blueprint’ 25th Anniversary With Eminem, Pharrell Williams and Slick Rick at Yankee Stadium - Variety Australia
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z Celebrates ‘The Blueprint’ 25th Anniversary With Eminem, Pharrell Williams and Slick Rick at Yankee Stadium. Jay-Z was almost entirely truthful to the source material for his 25th anniversary Yankee Stadium show on Saturday to celebrate “The Blueprint,” setting guests artists to high wattage but low frequency as he trotted out Eminem, Pharrell Williams and Slick Rick for a curtailed 90-minute set. The show began with instant homage as Jay brought out Slick Rick for “The Ruler’s Back,” launching into the factory line of songs that made up the spine of “The Blueprint.” There were stadium-sized highs (“U Don’t Know”), somber lows (“Song Cry”) and a highly assumed appearance from Eminem, who traded verses with Jay on “Renegade” and reemerged to perform his signature hit “Lose Yourself.”. Jay then kicked back up with “Empire State of Mind,” New York City’s torch song that he performed on Friday with Alicia Keys, before enlisting Pharrell Williams for a slew of collaborative hits spanning “I Just Wanna Love U (Give It 2 Me)” to “Frontin.” The show then, surprisingly, finished quickly, with “N—s in Paris,” “Public Service Announcement” and “Encore.”.
articles.summary: Jay-Z Celebrates ‘The Blueprint’ 25th Anniversary With Eminem, Pharrell Williams and Slick Rick at Yankee Stadium - Variety Australia

articles.title: Security breach causes chaos, delays start of final Jay-Z concert at Yankee Stadium - ABC7 New York
articles.snippet: # Security breach causes chaos, delays start of final Jay-Z concert at Yankee Stadium. THE BRONX (WABC) -- There was chaos at Jay-Z's third and final Yankee Stadium concert after a security breach delayed the show. Thousands of fans were seen outside the stadium waiting to get inside. A police source tells Eyewitness News a large group broke through security, prompting a full lockdown of the stadium. For a while, no one was allowed in or out. "We got here a little after 8, went to Gate 2, they bum rushed Gate 2. People went past security, were not checked and got into the stadium. They closed down Gate 2, we went to Gate 4, same thing happened," said Rosalynn Glover, "We were at the suite section, they would not even let us in there. The people working at Gate 4 were laughing. The concert was scheduled to begin at 8 p.m. The gates reopened shortly before 10 p.m. with police patrolling each entrance.
articles.summary: Security breach causes chaos, delays start of final Jay-Z concert at Yankee Stadium - ABC7 New York

articles.title: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Beyoncé, Rihanna and Usher - Variety
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Epic Late Night Show Featuring Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and More. “We’re going to go until like 5 a.m., so don’t be scared,” said Jay-Z not long after he started the third and final show of his Yankee Stadium residency on Sunday night, the concluding chapter to a weekend that paid homage to the 25th and 30th anniversaries of his seminal albums “The Blueprint” and “Reasonable Doubt,” respectively. The remark was made around 1 a.m, roughly 40 minutes after he started a concert that had been plagued by hours-long delays as fans waited both inside the stadium and on the perimeter of the venue, stuck in lines that didn’t budge. It was a ceaseless tour of his discography accented and enhanced by a rotating cast of guest artists that, to do justice, is best laid out as a plain list: Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Jermaine Dupri, Pharrell Williams, Clipse, Teyana Taylor, Swizz Beatz, Jeezy, Fat Joe, Jadakiss and The-Dream.
articles.summary: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Beyoncé, Rihanna and Usher - Variety

articles.title: ‘They say I sold out’: Jay-Z challenges Target partnership critics in Yankee Stadium freestyle - Yahoo
articles.snippet: # ‘They say I sold out’: Jay-Z challenges Target partnership critics in Yankee Stadium freestyle. Jay-Z is finally responding to critics who questioned his decision to partner with Target amid the retailer's ongoing boycott over its rollback of diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives. During opening night of his three-night Yankee Stadium residency celebrating the 30th anniversary of "Reasonable Doubt," the Brooklyn rap icon used a newly minted freestyle to address the controversy head-on, dismissing accusations that he abandoned Black consumers by releasing a Target-exclusive vinyl edition of his landmark debut album. It was Jay-Z choosing one of the biggest stages of his career to publicly answer a question that has followed him for months: whether one of hip-hop's first billionaire artists can balance corporate partnerships with the expectations of a community that increasingly views consumer spending as a form of political action.
articles.summary: ‘They say I sold out’: Jay-Z challenges Target partnership critics in Yankee Stadium freestyle - Yahoo

articles.title: Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Concert Delayed For Hours After Alleged Security Breach And Lockdown - Forbes
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Concert Delayed For Hours After Alleged Security Breach And Lockdown. Jay-Z’s concert at Yankee Stadium in New York was delayed by several hours on Sunday night following a reported security breach that led to a lockdown, prompting the billionaire rapper to take the stage after midnight and apologize to fans, saying he was concerned about people getting trampled. Sunday’s event was the last of Jay-Z’s three nights of concerts in New York and its start was delayed by more than four hours, according to local news outlet ABC7 Eyewitness News. The rapper eventually took the stage after midnight as security allowed fans to trickle in and apologized for the delay. Explaining the delay, Jay-Z said there were “like 10,000 people outside” when the doors were shut and he didn’t want to start before everyone entered to avoid a stampede-like situation. According to Forbes’ estimates, Jay-Z has a net worth of $2.8 billion as of Monday morning.
articles.summary: Jay-Z’s Yankee Stadium Concert Delayed For Hours After Alleged Security Breach And Lockdown - Forbes

articles.title: Jay-Z's final Yankee Stadium show was a trip down memory lane. See the surprise celebrity guests he brought onstage. - Business Insider
articles.snippet: On Sunday, New York City's Yankee Stadium was certainly a concrete jungle where dreams are made of — at least, for the thousands of Jay-Z fans who waited hours to see the rapper take the stage for the third and final night of his residency there. A four-hour delay caused the show to kick off around 12:15 a.m., instead of the scheduled 8 p.m. In a joint statement, Roc Nation and Yankee Stadium told Business Insider that "hundreds of individuals in large groups — who did not have tickets to tonight's performance — stormed over peaceful ticketholders, and in some cases, breached security," which led to the gates being closed for "an extended period of time.". For many, it was worth the wait, as friends, family, and longtime collaborators joined one of New York City's most beloved musicians onstage, including Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Pharrell Williams, Jeezy, Fat Joe, and more.
articles.summary: Jay-Z's final Yankee Stadium show was a trip down memory lane. See the surprise celebrity guests he brought onstage. - Business Insider

articles.title: Jay-Z apologizes after Yankee Stadium show starts hours late, says there was a safety issue - NBC News
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z apologizes after Yankee Stadium show starts hours late, says there was a safety issue. Sunday night’s show wrapped Jay-Z’s three-night hometown concert at the stadium to celebrate the 30th anniversary of his debut album, “Reasonable Doubt.”. Jay-Z apologized to fans after an hourslong delay at his Sunday night show, telling the crowd at Yankee Stadium that a safety issue prompted security to close the doors. It was like 10,000 people outside and they closed all the doors. Somebody rushed the door, and they closed the door for you guys’ safety and everybody’s safety outside,” he said in a video posted on X. Sunday night’s show wrapped Jay-Z’s three-night hometown concert at the stadium to celebrate the 30th anniversary of his debut album — “Reasonable Doubt” — and the 25th anniversary of “The Blueprint.” Special guests at the shows included his wife and singer-songwriter Beyoncé, Alicia Keys, Nas, Eminem, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and Pharrell Williams, according to the Hollywood Reporter.
articles.summary: Jay-Z apologizes after Yankee Stadium show starts hours late, says there was a safety issue - NBC News

articles.snippet: * Click here to listen to this article. This is read by an automated voice. See more from the L.A. Times in Google Search. Jay-Z brought a parade of guests to the stage Sunday night at New York’s Yankee Stadium, where the veteran rapper closed a three-night stand marking the 30th anniversary of his debut album, “Reasonable Doubt,” and the 25th anniversary of his commercial breakthrough, “The Blueprint.”. Rihanna joined Jay-Z for “Run This Town,” then stuck around to do her “Bitch Better Have My Money,” according to reports in Variety and the New York Times. Variety said the show ended at 3 a.m. Sunday’s show followed two earlier Yankee Stadium gigs in which Jay-Z brought out Beyoncé and their daughter, Blue Ivy Carter, as well as Nas, Eminem, Memphis Bleek, Jaz-O and Slick Rick. articles.title: What Jay-Z has in his watch collection, from one of the most complicated designs ever made to a $6 million timepiece - Business Insider
articles.snippet: # What Jay-Z has in his watch collection, from one of the most complicated designs ever made to a $6 million timepiece. Jay-Z once rapped the line "Time is money." When he said that in his film "Streets Is Watching," he meant it quite literally. You might remember the $1,075,652 Patek Philippe Grand Complication 5304-301R he wore at the 2025 Grammys. That was only one example — and it's far from the most expensive in his collection. ## Jay-Z has a Patek Philippe Grand Complication 5304-301R that retails for more than $1 million. Jay-Z, born Shawn Carter, is a big fan of Patek Philippe watches. He wore one with a rose-gold case and dozens of diamonds for the 2025 Grammys. On the Patek Philippe website, the watch is valued at $1,075,652. In 2012, his wife and fellow artist Beyoncé gifted Jay-Z a Hublot Big Bang in 18-karat white gold for his 43rd birthday.
articles.summary: What Jay-Z has in his watch collection, from one of the most complicated designs ever made to a $6 million timepiece - Business Insider

articles.title: Jay-Z, Drake, Justin Bieber & Don Toliver Soundtrack Official 2026 Fanatics Fest Playlist - Billboard
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z, Drake, Justin Bieber & Don Toliver Soundtrack Official 2026 Fanatics Fest Playlist. Fanatics Fest is returning to NYC this weekend, and Audiomack unveiled the official playlist to soundtrack the festivities on Tuesday (July 14). The 50-track playlist boasts hits like Drake’s “Shabang,” Jay-Z’s “Empire State of Mind,” Justin Bieber’s “Yukon,” Sabrina Carpenter’s “Bed Chem,” Pop Smoke’s “Dior,” Don Toliver’s “E85” and Taylor Swift’s “Anti-Hero.”. “At Audiomack, we believe that discovering new artists is one of the most exciting parts of being a music fan. Fanatics Fest brings together sports, music, and entertainment in a way that feels incredibly authentic, so becoming the official streaming partner was a perfect fit. We’re excited to help soundtrack the weekend while introducing fans to the next generation of artists,” said Audiomack’s co-founder and chief marketing officer, **David Ponte**. Sports and music have been synonymous for decades, and those worlds will clash once again at Fanatics Fest, which takes over the Javits Center in NYC from July 16 through July 19.
articles.summary: Jay-Z, Drake, Justin Bieber & Don Toliver Soundtrack Official 2026 Fanatics Fest Playlist - Billboard

In his Foreword to the book, the Dalai Lama writes that this novel ‘encourages readers to begin their own journey of self-discovery, freeing themselves from ego and attachments while embracing life’s impermanence as a path to deeper happiness and fulfilment’. As he tells his better half Shraddha: ‘I have realized that success is  not just personal effort, it’s also the support of others… While I may be the face of success, the true heroes are those who empower me to perform on the field, the uncelebrated but essential.’ There is an overall change in Siddharth’s demeanor and relationships on and off the field.

articles.title: 周杰倫新專輯〈太陽之子〉解析：當十字架刺穿吸血鬼　原歌名「我就是光」
articles.snippet: 周杰倫〈太陽之子〉MV的終局停格，像極了動作遊戲通關後的結算畫面。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. 一億元的藝術實驗〈太陽之子〉數位專輯3月25日全球上線，實體專輯4月10日發行。這支長達6分58秒的MV，由導演廖人帥執導，紐西蘭維塔工作室（Weta Workshop）操刀視覺。維塔工作室曾參與《阿凡達》、《魔戒》、《沙丘》等超過180部電影，拿下5座奧斯卡金像獎。MV在巴黎聖女貞德教堂（Chapelle Sainte-Jeanne-d'Arc）及台北兩地拍攝，歷時2年3個月完成，製作費逼近台幣一億元，創下華語樂壇MV紀錄。上線迄今，YouTube觀看次數已突破800萬人次。周杰倫在記者會上形容，這支MV是「藝術與流行音樂的跨界實驗」，鼓勵歌迷「回去再看一次，找找看裡面藏了哪些畫」。他並透露，原歌名為「我就是光」，後因張學友在周杰倫2023年香港嘉年華演唱會期間贈送印有「太陽之子」的芒果與手寫卡片而改名。歌迷們確實聽話地去找了MV當中藏有哪些畫，留言區很快出現逐格比對，「藝術解謎」成為社群討論的主旋律。然而，把這些名畫按出場順序排列，會發現，它們講述的故事遠比藝術史更古老。概念走在歌詞之前進入MV解析之前，有一件事值得先知道：這支MV的創作順序，和一般流行音樂完全相反。一般創作，是先有完整的歌，再拍MV。而〈太陽之子〉和四年前〈最偉大的作品〉的創作流程是：曲（DEMO） MV概念 MV劇本 拍攝 歌詞。周杰倫先創作出曲的初版，同時給導演廖人帥出了一功課：一、要有很多名畫，二、要有很酷的槍戰。廖人帥在只有DEMO的情況下，先發展出完整劇本，拍攝完成後，作詞人方文山才根據MV內容來填詞。這意味著概念先於歌詞。MV以沒有歌聲的純視覺敘事開場。被稱為惠斯勒之母的《灰與黑的編排》《第一號》（圖右）中，一位老婦人安靜端坐平靜安穩，被稱為「維多利亞時代的蒙娜麗莎」。然而，MV中的婦人卻是驚駭大叫。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）接著死亡登場：大衛的《馬拉之死》中，浴缸裡被刺殺的法國革命領袖。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）林布蘭《解剖學課》中攤開的屍體，領人直視「死亡」。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）布格羅《但丁與維吉爾在地獄》（圖左）中「咬」的動作；達文西《蒙娜麗莎》的脖子上多了原畫沒有的咬痕。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）偵探在森林水邊發現「女屍」：米萊的《奧菲莉亞》。原畫取材自莎士比亞《哈姆雷特》，描繪精神崩潰的奧菲莉亞仰躺水面，被花朵環繞，將沉未沉。MV忠實重現這個構圖。偵探注意到纏在女屍腿上的不是真實的花，而是金色的金屬枝葉：那是不自然的東西。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）歌詞唱到「克林姆的吻是一種別離」時，畫面以回憶方式呈現克林姆1908年的《吻》（圖上，中位置是原畫）。原畫用大量金箔，描繪一對情侶跪在花草地邊緣擁抱。MV讓金色微粒從天傾瀉如光雨，把靜態金箔變成動態空間。值得注意的是：這是「過去」的畫面，不是「現在」，它是被害者被掠奪之前，最後一次感受到愛的瞬間。之後，「愛」就被吸血鬼掠奪。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）偵探桌面上散落報紙（標題「Strange Bite Marks?」）和皮膚醫學文獻。三幅畫作並排構成「證據牆」：萊頓《燃燒的六月》中，一位女子身穿橘紅色薄紗蜷縮沉睡，處於睡眠與死亡的邊界；海耶茲1859年《吻》中，一對情侶在暗色中世紀場景中激情擁吻；第三幅描繪暴力攫取。三個階段，拼出吸血鬼的犯罪模式：使人陷入沉睡親密接觸掠奪。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）第一幕：死亡的藝廊MV到底在演什麼？一幅一幅地查，發現一件事：周杰倫（或者說導演廖人帥）挑選的這些畫，不是隨便放的。MV開場的五幅畫，像電影的冷開場，沒有歌詞，是純視覺敘事。第一幅是惠斯勒的《灰與黑的編排第一號》，大家更熟悉的名字是「惠斯勒的母親」。惠斯勒刻意用「灰與黑的編排」來命名，因為他主張藝術應該是純粹的色彩與構圖的和諧，就像音樂的編排，而不是為了講故事或說教。用這幅畫開場，像是周杰倫在一開始就告訴觀眾：接下來你會看到的，不是佈道，是藝術。從MV中這名婦人角色看見了死去的人，驚訝地坐下，灰黑色調籠罩整個畫面，死亡登場。然後《馬拉之死》出現，真人重現那個被刺殺在浴缸裡的法國革命領袖右手還握著筆，左手拿著請願書，旁邊有木箱和羽毛筆，戲劇性的明暗光線完全是原畫調子。原畫的畫家大衛是馬拉的朋友，趕到現場親眼目睹後，刻意用聖殤圖的構圖，把馬拉畫成近似從十字架上被放下的基督。VERSE雜誌指出，周杰倫放進這幅畫，是向觀眾拋出提問：什麼是值得用生命守護的事？接著是林布蘭《解剖學課》周杰倫和一群穿黑衣戴白色荷葉領的醫師，圍著解剖台上的屍體，直視屍體，也直面「死亡」。然後，《但丁與維吉爾在地獄》閃過「咬」的動作，《蒙娜麗莎》脖子上出現咬痕。犯罪手法被暗示了，但還沒說破。接著，偵探在水邊發現《奧菲莉亞》的場景。米萊選擇畫的是她已在水中、將沉未沉的那一刻，花朵各有象徵：罌粟代表死亡、柳枝代表被遺棄的愛情、紫羅蘭代表貞潔。歌詞用「莎士比亞筆下的純真」和「哈姆雷特花叢那歌聲」來定位。「火炬的光不照著劇本」（歌詞）暗示，這些死亡的背後有一個不在「官方劇本」裡的力量在運作。然後是關鍵細節。「蝙蝠轟然離去」直接指向吸血鬼。偵探拿起纏在女屍身上的金色枝葉，歌詞問「浮出水面的是不是真理」。答案是否定的。金色枝葉是金屬的、不會凋謝的、人造的，和奧菲莉亞身邊應該有的真花完全不同。它是自然生命力被掠奪之後的殘留物。偵探拿著它，就像拿著犯罪現場的物證。《吻》以回憶閃回出現時，歌詞寫「克林姆的吻是一種別離」。這個時間設定很重要：它不是正在發生的救贖，而是過去曾發生的事，受害者被掠奪之前最後一次感受到愛。副歌炸開：「我就是光，照亮遠方黑夜。」偵探從被動的調查者，變成主動的宣告者。第一幕結束。在《夜遊者》的餐館裡遇見梵谷。霍普1942年的《夜遊者》描繪一家深夜餐廳，四名幾乎不交流的人被刺眼的人工白光照得通透，玻璃外是黑色街道，霍普刻意移除了門，觀者永遠被隔在外面。MV打破這個設計：偵探走進畫裡面，坐下等候，被吸血鬼襲擊後仍舊存活下來的證人梵谷。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）苦艾酒，19世紀末，梵谷那個世代藝術家的標誌性飲品。偵探飲下苦艾酒，視覺世界劇烈轉變。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）以第一人稱主觀視角重現梵谷《在亞爾的臥室》。黃綠色的床、旋轉的燈光、傾斜的牆面，全部從平面變成沉浸式體驗。觀眾不是在「看」梵谷的畫，而是暫時「活在」梵谷的世界。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）偵探不是在外面「調查」梵谷的案件，他是喝下同樣的「酒」，讓自己進入受害者的主觀經驗。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）偵探走進最後的戰場，吸血鬼襲擊梵谷的地方：《奧維爾教堂》。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）第二幕：孤獨的調查第二幕慢了下來。偵探來到馬奈《女神遊樂廳的吧台》場景，這是藝術史上表達「孤獨」的名作。MV在原畫構圖上，加了一個原本不存在的角色：周杰倫飾演的偵探，低頭看報，坐在女侍者面前卻完全不看她。原畫中，這個位置的男子只存在於鏡中反射裡，MV把他實體化，反而讓「被注視卻不被看見」的孤獨感更強烈。接著，偵探在霍普《夜遊者》的場景中遇見梵谷。VERSE雜誌指出，霍普筆下的孤獨「從來都不是呼天搶地，卻引人沈沈地難受」。霍普刻意移除餐廳的門，觀者永遠被隔在外面。但MV打破這個設計：偵探走進去，坐下來，和梵谷面對面。藝術史裡一個被設計成「永遠無法進入」的空間，第一次有人走進來陪伴。梵谷拿出一幅畫：《奧維爾教堂》。這是他生命最後階段的作品，離他過世僅約一個月，教堂線條扭曲、天空深藍得幾乎發黑。字幕是梵谷的台詞：「吸血鬼在這地方咬了我的耳朵。」（While I was here, a vampire bit my ear.）這句話用黑色幽默重新包裝梵谷割耳事件把「我割掉了自己的耳朵」，換成「有東西從我身上奪走了某樣事物」。然後是一個讓我查了好一陣子才搞清楚的細節：桌上那杯飲料是綠色的。苦艾酒。19世紀末被稱為「綠色仙子」，是梵谷、高更、波特萊爾那整個世代的標誌性飲品，曾被認為含有會誘發幻覺的成分，甚至加劇了梵谷的精神崩潰，影響了他畫中那種扭曲翻湧的視覺風格。偵探飲下這杯苦艾酒。歌詞唱的是「調了一杯迷惑的無解」，這杯酒就是那個「無解」。飲下之後，視覺世界變成梵谷的主觀視角：《在亞爾的臥室》的黃綠色床鋪、旋轉的燈光、傾斜的透視，全部從平面變成沉浸式體驗。這個轉變的意義，值得停下來想一下。偵探沒有站在安全距離外分析。他喝下同樣的「酒」，讓自己進入受害者主觀世界。他暫時放下偵探的冷靜，換來對受害者痛苦的第一手感受。他必須先知道「孤獨者」的感受，才能走進第三幕面對吸血鬼。教堂內部荒廢，蛛網覆蓋長椅，蠟燭是僅存光源；吸血鬼安然坐在前排。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）精心準備的銀子彈，射向吸血鬼，超現實的大戰開打。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）空間的扭曲似乎也表達：這是跨越極長時間的戰鬥。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）銀子彈失敗後，偵探拆下教堂的十字架窗框刺穿吸血鬼。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）畫面突然閃白、音樂安靜，血點一滴滴落下來。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）突然，副歌唱起：我就是光！（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）吸血鬼被消滅後，畫面停格成動作遊戲的結算畫面，哥德字體打上「Children of the Sun」與「Jay Chou」就像畫家在作品完成後落款蓋印，周杰倫在這幅他自己創造的「第31幅名畫」上，簽下名字。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）第三幕：教堂裡的對決偵探走進梵谷畫中的教堂內部。而梵谷只畫過《奧維爾教堂》的外觀，從未畫過裡面。MV則進入一個藝術史不存在的空間，吸血鬼已經在裡面等著。他能坐在教堂前排，是因為這座教堂已經荒廢，神聖性被掏空。從而省思，當信仰的空間被遺棄（沒有神），留下的空殼就會被別的東西填滿。第三幕的視覺風格，從古典名畫轉為當代流行文化。遊戲《惡魔獵人》的但丁、《惡魔城》的貝爾蒙特家族、電影《駭客任務》的動作美學。MV在這裡做一個媒介跳躍：前兩幕走進名畫，第三幕走進遊戲和電影。吸血鬼的戰場不只存在於過去藝術史中，也在當代人的文化裡。偵探用銀子彈對付吸血鬼，完全無效。銀子彈是人發明的武器。最後，他拆下教堂的十字架窗框，刺穿吸血鬼胸口。畫面被血紅色覆蓋。副歌開始演唱，字幕打出：「我就是光。」遊戲結算畫面般的停格之後，淡入最後一幀：畫作躺在泥土與草叢間，沾了泥、邊緣燒焦。名畫從美術館的牆上掉下來了。片尾金句：「Within every heart lies a dark side. * MV以沒有歌聲的純視覺敘事開場。被稱為惠斯勒之母的《灰與黑的編排》《第一號》（圖右）中，一位老婦人安靜端坐平靜安穩，被稱為「維多利亞時代的蒙娜麗莎」。然而，MV中的婦人卻是驚駭大叫。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * Chou）. MV忠實重現這個構圖。偵探注意到纏在女屍腿上的不是真實的花，而是金色的金屬枝葉：那是不自然的東西。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. 三個階段，拼出吸血鬼的犯罪模式：**使人陷入沉睡**→**親密接觸**→**掠奪**。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. MV打破這個設計：偵探走進畫裡面，坐下等候，被吸血鬼襲擊後仍舊存活下來的證人梵谷。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 偵探走進最後的戰場，吸血鬼襲擊梵谷的地方：《奧維爾教堂》。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 精心準備的銀子彈，射向吸血鬼，超現實的大戰開打。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 空間的扭曲似乎也表達：這是跨越極長時間的戰鬥。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 銀子彈失敗後，偵探拆下教堂的十字架窗框刺穿吸血鬼。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 畫面突然閃白、音樂安靜，血點一滴滴落下來。（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. * 突然，副歌唱起：**我就是光！**（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）. 每個人心中都藏著黑暗面。你必須選擇與它共存，或徹底戰勝它。」那條幾乎沒人注意到的線在所有討論中，歌迷在辨認名畫，樂評在分析曲風，但少有人把整支MV故事線拉出來，然後問一句：這三幕在講什麼？第一幕：有什麼東西不對勁。美好事物正在被偷竊、美好的人被殺害、世界正被毀壤。愛、創造力、理想，一個接一個死去。金色枝葉取代真花，人造的永恆取代真實的生命。第二幕：有人走進苦難的現場。偵探沒有站在遠處分析，他喝下苦艾酒，讓自己進入受害者世界。他選擇先經歷黑暗，才去面對黑暗的源頭。第三幕：人的武器失敗，信仰的符號成功。教堂可以荒廢，十字架仍然有效。最後流出的血不是被奪取的，而是在對決中給出的。吸血鬼靠吸別人的血維持生命，但刺穿他的那一刻流出的血，終結了掠奪。如果你對基督教的核心敘事有一點點熟悉，這三幕的結構，會讓你心裡一動：它和「墮落道成肉身十字架救贖」的故事線，幾乎是平行的。世界出了問題，美好事物被某種寄生性的力量扭曲。然後拯救者不是從遠處發大招，而是親身走進黑暗、承受黑暗。最後，十字架上的血不是被奪取的，而是主動給出的「沒有人奪我的命去，是我自己捨的」（約翰福音10章18節）。掠奪者的邏輯，被徹底翻轉：奪取帶來的是虛假的永恆，給予帶來的才是真實的生命。「我就是光」這四個字，出現在血覆蓋畫面的那一刻。約翰福音8章12節：「我是世界的光。跟從我的，就不在黑暗裡走，必要得著生命的光。」而「我就是光」，正是這首歌的原歌名。周杰倫在記者會上沒有提到信仰，他說的是希望藉專輯傳遞「正能量」和「戰勝心魔」。這支MV的劇本選擇教堂、十字架、寶血、「我就是光」這些不是隨機元素，它們指向一方向。十三年後，信仰再次出現在創作裡2013年9月，周杰倫在台北小巨蛋個人演唱會上，與教會肢體一同演唱詩歌〈Jesus Fashion〉，這是他首次在大型公開場合宣告信仰。此次〈太陽之子〉整支MV最後的敘事骨架十字架從荒廢教堂中被取出、刺穿黑暗的掠奪者、血覆蓋一切、「我就是光」這些是在劇本階段就被寫定的。此外，拍攝地的選擇聖女貞德教堂（Chapelle Sainte-Jeanne-d'Arc），紀念的是一位因信仰被燒死的殉道者。MV中，偵探在教堂裡拆下十字架，戰勝黑暗，而這座教堂紀念的，正是一位為了所相信的事付出生命的人。從〈Jesus Fashion〉到〈太陽之子〉，十三年，周杰倫對信仰的創作表達從「直接宣告」走向「用故事承載」。2013年那晚在小巨蛋，台下是1萬5千名歌迷；這支MV上線迄今，全世界已有超過800萬人聽過面向的不是教會內的弟兄姊妹，是每一個點開螢幕的人。片尾金句疊在上面：「Within every heart lies a dark side. 每個人心中都藏著黑暗面。你必須選擇與它共存，或徹底戰勝它。」（圖／翻攝自YouTube頻道：周杰倫 Jay Chou）.
articles.summary: 周杰倫新專輯〈太陽之子〉MV以億元製作費、融合多幅名畫與深刻信仰主題，呈現藝術與流行音樂的跨界實驗，獲得高度讚賞。

articles.title: 周星馳新片遭轟「難看」！周杰倫親自發聲力挺　1句話曝兩人交情
articles.snippet: # 周星馳新片遭轟「難看」！周杰倫親自發聲力挺　1句話曝兩人交情. 「星爺」周星馳自編自導新片《功夫女足》11日在中國上映，上映首日便以22.6萬場排片刷新紀錄，票房迅速衝破人民幣3億元（約新台幣14億元）。雖然電影開出亮眼成績，但上映後觀眾評價呈現兩極，而樂壇天王周杰倫則發聲力挺，親自在社群轉發電影海報，替好友新作宣傳。. ## 周杰倫發文喊話進戲院支持. 周杰倫今（12日）在Instagram限時動態轉發《功夫女足》宣傳海報，寫下：「星爺電影大賣，大家記得去看喔。」短短一句話展現對周星馳的支持，也讓不少粉絲大讚兩人的好交情。事實上，周杰倫與周星馳近年互動頻繁，過去曾多次在社群隔空交流，還曾在香港合體掀起話題，一度傳出雙方未來有望展開合作，令影迷相當期待。. 儘管票房表現強勢，《功夫女足》上映後口碑卻出現明顯分歧。有觀眾認為電影延續周星馳一貫的無厘頭風格，但也有人認為笑點與劇情未達預期，讓電影在網路上掀起熱烈討論。. ## 主持人開酸「好難看」　網路評價掀兩極. 東方衛視主持人林海看完電影後，更直接在微博曬出票根發文寫下：「星爺，不欠你了。好難看。」隨後再補充：「因為真金白銀看過之前的每一部，所以不欠。」他也在其他貼文留言直言：「哏是老的、演員是過火的、劇本是脆弱的。」犀利評論迅速引發網友論戰，有人認同他的看法，也有人認為仍應親自進戲院觀賞，再評斷電影優劣。. 周杰倫（右）喊話支持周星馳的新片。翻攝stephenchow IG. 郭富城「40年前舊愛」強勢復出！消失33年首談天王　鬆口：不介意同場. 57歲翁虹首揭豪門婚變真相！還原「遭掃地出門、家暴」始末：像簽錯合同. IU認愛李鍾碩4年後分手！劉寅娜曾爆她戀愛「全配合」累到送醫　苦勸：換這種男友. ## 其他人也在看. ### 《功夫女足》票房破38億！「梨花隊」奧步劇情惹怒韓網. 香港喜劇天王周星馳睽違多年推出的新作《功夫女足》，上映後在商業市場展現強大吸金力，全球票房目前已突破8億元人民幣（約38億元台幣），亮眼成績讓外界再次見識「星爺」的票房號召力。不過，在票房捷報背後，電影也掀起不少國際爭議，其中南韓媒體與網友對片中疑似影射南韓足球隊的設定強烈反彈，認為劇情有醜化南韓體育形象之嫌，也讓該片能否順利在南韓上映成為外界討論焦點。. ### 周星馳《功夫女足》破影史紀錄 王晶揭不如《少林足球》關鍵. 香港喜劇天王周星馳睽違7年推出新電影《功夫女足》，11日在大陸上映後，吸引大批影迷朝聖，且至截稿前已累積8.87億人民幣（約新台幣42.1億元）票房，突破近3年大陸暑期檔期的影史紀錄。而周星馳日前被問到破紀錄的心情，他謙虛坦言不是自己的功勞，立刻引起現場觀眾歡呼。. ### 川普轟伊朗另有目的？　美官員曝：在為後續更大行動鋪路　中國又爆暗助伊朗？　海上情報船追蹤美軍動態　3貨機從雷達消失疑送軍火｜全球聊天室｜#鏡新聞. 鏡電視推出個人廣告囉！ 讓你也能成為廣告主Show Yourself👉https://mnews.oen.tw/ 《鏡好買》電商平台全新上線🔥 鏡好買是鏡電視全新推出的官方選物平台，精選日常生活中真正好用、安心、有品質的商品，從美食、生活用品到居家好物，幫你把關品質好生活❤️ 現在加入就送購物優惠券👉 https://lihi.cc/keGMC 加入頻道會員支持鏡新聞🩷： https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4LjkybVKXCDlneVXlKAbmw/join 鏡好買MirrorLife👉https://lihi.cc/keGMC 鏡電視綜合台YouTube👉http://pse.is/59enw2 鏡電視直播台YouTube👉https://pse.is/4w3gts. ### 周星馳《功夫女足》4天票房破8億！觀眾怒揭「偷票房」全網炸鍋. 周星馳《功夫女足》4天票房破8億，這部讓無數影迷翹首以盼的力作，一上映便以排山倒海之勢席捲全國院線，再次證明了「星爺」無可替代的票房號召力。然而，在這份令人振奮的捷報背後，這部熱血又溫馨的喜劇卻在暗地裡遭遇「偷票房」的不正當競爭風暴。許多滿懷期待進場支持的忠實觀眾，在走出影院後憤怒地發現，自己用真金白銀為情懷買下的單，竟然可能根本沒有進到星爺與製作團隊的口袋裡，引發外界熱烈討論。（記者唐家興）. 三立新聞網 setn.com ・ 6 小時前 ・ 2則留言. ### 白天如黑夜！陽交大教職員宿舍詭異「貼滿錫箔紙」 竟是林教授夫妻住所. 陽明交大電機工程學系教授林詩淳持刀狠殺紀姓連襟，造成對方傷重不治，刀刀瞄準胸部以上，致人於死目的明顯，而一切禍端全因家族財產紛爭。據了解，林詩淳與妻子住在教職員宿舍，且無論是窗戶還是天花板都貼滿錫箔紙，就算是白天也幾乎沒有光線，相當詭異。. ### 英法都不想踢！美媒酸世界盃季軍戰：根本是對4強敗隊的羞辱. 2026美加墨世界盃季軍戰將由英格蘭對決法國，不過這場比賽尚未開踢，就再度引發「是否有存在必要」的爭論。美國資深體育記者Brian T. Smith在《talkSPORT》撰文痛批，季軍戰對剛在4強落敗的球隊而言，不是安慰，而是一種近乎羞辱的安排，呼籲國際足總（FIFA）未來應考慮取消。. ### 五月天才剛休團！阿信驚喜公布新身分　粉絲全嚇歪：哪來的美國時間. ### 誤認孩童落水！71歲嬤縱身跳河　救完人就走了家人事後才知情. 根據《安徽日報》報導，事件發生於7月13日下午6時左右，沱河路橋附近突然有人高聲呼救。當時正在橋下與友人聊天的71歲劉德芳聽見聲音後，立刻起身趕往落水地點。當她準備脫鞋下水時，現場一名女子趕緊從岸邊護欄取下一只救生圈遞給她。劉德芳接過救生圈後毫不遲疑，直接穿越... ### Toyota全新「小Land Cruiser」上市引爆熱烈迴響！「這台終於買得起了！」「想從Jimny換過來……」掀起搶購潮！？超高CP值備受矚目！全新「FJ」話題爆棚，經銷商曝光消費者最真實的心聲！. Toyota全新「Land Cruiser FJ」作為Land Cruiser家族最新、也是最小的成員登場，憑 […]. ### 「紅霞」明恐生成！雨彈狂砸全台7天　降雨熱區曝光. 中央氣象署發布最新資訊，熱帶性低氣壓TD12正向東北東緩慢移動。今日14時其中心位於北緯4.3度、東經151.8度，中心氣壓為1004百帕。一旦正式升格，將成為今年第 12 號颱風，並命名為「紅霞」（Noul）。. ### 梅西就是山羊！兩記助攻逆轉英格蘭　貝克漢親口認證：他就是史上第一. 體育中心／綜合報導阿根廷隊長梅西（Lionel Messi）在面對英格蘭的四強賽中，以兩記神級助攻主導整場比賽的逆轉勝。賽後前英格蘭隊長貝克漢（David Beckham）看著祖國球隊無緣決賽，仍展現極高的風度，認為梅西就是史上第一（Greatest of all time）。. FTV Sports ・ 13 小時前 ・ 3則留言. ### 嘉義「模特級超正配送員」俐落搬貨暴紅！閨蜜高喊單身. 生活中心／王妤倢報導有看過這麼漂亮的物流配送士嗎？近日有網友在嘉義街頭直擊一名外型極為亮眼的女物流配送員，她身手俐落爬進後車廂搬貨，隨後身手矯健地推著推車送貨。這幕認真工作的「神級背影」讓目擊原PO忍不住讚嘆：「這model（模特）等級耶！」就連一旁的女友也連聲驚呼「好漂亮」。影片曝光後，隨即引來近5.4萬名網友按讚朝聖。. ### 嘉義街頭目擊正妹配送員！超高顏值網讚：女友也說漂亮. 嘉義街頭一名女性配送員在送貨的畫面，在社群平台引發熱議，影片中的女配送員以亮眼外型和俐落的工作態度吸引大量關注，原PO還盛讚「連我女友也說很漂亮」，掀起大眾討論。. ### 梅西聽到了什麼怒瞪貝林漢？23歲英格蘭中場球星竟敢槓上大前輩. 體育中心／丁泰祥 報導英格蘭和阿根廷這場比賽，上半場雙方都沒進球，但競爭激烈火藥味濃厚，中場休息時，英格蘭明星中場貝林漢，不知道和大前輩梅西說了些什麼，讓這位阿根廷天王怒目相視，看起來相當火大，賽後，貝林漢當然也被媒體問到這題。. ### 結婚觀念大不同！網曝光「極簡婚禮」成新趨勢. 生活中心／鄭若曦報導舉辦婚禮對於新人而言一直是一筆不小的開銷，許多人也會想盡辦法希望省下一些費用。日前就有一名網友發文表示自己在和長輩聊天時，發現自己的長輩仍然希望女生結婚時要舉行婚禮，因為這樣才能讓大家知道自己「有娘家」、「有人疼」，認為若不辦婚禮會讓人覺得女性是被草率娶回家。然而網友也發現如今愈來愈多年輕新人選擇不辦婚禮，藉此省下一筆開銷，因此發文和其他網友討論對於婚禮的看法，也引來許多網友留言分享自己的「極簡婚禮」，有些儀式感但同時也能省下不少金錢。. ### 超便宜、約138萬日圓！全新「6人座Compact Car」即將上市！採用對開式車門的方正車身設計，搭載創新的「面對面座椅」！獲政府認證的「Olinia Uno」Mexico規格究竟是什麼樣的車呢？. 由Mexico政府推動開發的全新Compact EV「Olinia Uno」正式發表。這款車以約138萬日圓的 […]. ### 體重36公斤女遭鄰居闖入侵犯！機警設局「請他倒垃圾」錄下鐵證判刑. 台中市北區一處大樓2024年間發生一起性侵案，一名女住客「小花」（化名），深夜聽聞敲門聲，原以為是男友現身，未料開門後竟遭素未謀面的鄰居劉男強行闖入侵犯，面對體型懸殊的暴力脅迫，小花在受害後主動要求交換LINE聯絡方式，更請對方「順手幫倒垃圾」，藉此讓大樓監視器拍下嫌犯身影，案經台中地院審結，依強制性交罪判處劉男3年6個月徒刑。. ### 人妻自爆「交往18任帥哥後嫁備胎」慘遭炎上急鎖帳號. ### 杜汶澤餐廳開不到一年出大事！無預警發「白底黑字聲明」火速開除店長. 港星杜汶澤4年前取得台灣國籍、與妻子田蕊妮移居台灣後，因為實在太懷念香港家鄉味，去年12月特地在台北市大安區強勢插旗，打造全新港式小吃品牌「小杜麵館」。當時杜汶澤為了研發餐點、設計菜單投注大量心力，開幕時還親自站上第一線備料、招呼客人，甚至累到開玩笑放話：「這是我第一次開餐廳，這輩子不會再開了。」沒. ### 日本暗黑女神揭拒移居台灣真相　「這條件」全亞洲最差. 娛樂中心／駱瑩倫報導日本前AV女優濱崎真緒近日因談及未來發展地點，在社群平台掀起熱烈討論。她透露，長年收到粉絲詢問「為什麼不搬到台灣發展」，但經過市場環境、工作機會與生活條件等多方面評估後，她認為台灣並不是目前最適合自己的選擇，「老實說工作的話，台灣店家工資是我現在全亞洲最低的」。.
articles.summary: 周杰倫在社群媒體上發文力挺好友周星馳的新片《功夫女足》，展現兩人深厚交情，並呼籲粉絲進戲院支持。

articles.title: 周杰倫飛英國合體20冠球王費德勒！私下真實交情曝光 昆凌全程見證
articles.snippet: 華語天王周杰倫（周董）近日與妻子昆凌飛往英國觀賞溫布頓網球錦標賽，夫妻倆除了欣賞精彩賽事，更驚喜與網球傳奇費德勒（Roger Federer）相聚。周杰倫事後曬出合照，
articles.summary: 周杰倫與妻子昆凌赴英國溫布頓觀賽，並與網球傳奇費德勒驚喜合體，展現私下好交情。

articles.title: 周杰倫、昆凌同框費德勒 網：這組合太猛了
articles.snippet: 華語歌壇天王周杰倫（周董）日前偕妻子昆凌赴英國觀賞溫布頓網球錦標賽，賽後意外與網壇傳奇人物費德勒（Roger Federer）同框合影，只見兩名男士西裝筆挺、
articles.summary: 周杰倫與妻子昆凌在英國溫布頓網球錦標賽上，意外與網壇傳奇費德勒同框合影，引發網友熱議。

articles.title: ‘Jeopardy’ champ nearly defeated after flubbing ‘Final Jeopardy’ in his 9th appearance on the game show - Entertainment Weekly
articles.snippet: With a total of $240,500 in winnings thus far, law and policy student Caleb Groen has broken a record previously held by 31-game winner Jamie Ding. * Groen advanced to “Final Jeopardy” in the lead, but submitted an incorrect guess to a “Historic Books” clue. * The law and policy student will compete for the 10th time on Wednesday, with $240,500 in total winnings. Caleb Groen, a 27-year-old law and policy student from Thousand Oaks, Calif., advanced to his ninth game on Tuesday with $220,500 in total winnings. Though he has a long way to go in beating the season’s current champ, Jamie Ding, who won a total of $882,605 during his 31-game winning streak earlier this year, Groen has already broken a couple of records. As of July 10’s episode, Groen had answered all 13 “Daily Doubles” he encountered correctly, though that streak was broken on Tuesday after an incorrect guess on a clue about peat moss.
articles.summary: ‘Jeopardy’ champ nearly defeated after flubbing ‘Final Jeopardy’ in his 9th appearance on the game show - Entertainment Weekly

articles.title: Paris Jackson's Legal War With Michael's Estate Rages On After Her Recent Court Win - TMZ
articles.snippet: # Paris Jackson's Legal War With Michael's Estate Rages On After Her Recent Court Win. ## Michael Jackson Estate Legal War With Paris Jackson Rages On. **Paris Jackson** and the executor of her late father **Michael Jackson**'s estate are duking it out in court again … beefing over sealing documents in their never-ending legal battle. In newly filed court docs, obtained by TMZ, Paris slams **John Branca**'s request to seal certain documents related to her objections to his request for payment of fees. According to the docs, Paris has also suggested the MJ estate remains open after all these years due to how the executor has been managing things and said she remains largely in the dark about the estate's financial matters ... Paris said John and the recently **deceased** **John McClain** were paid over $120 million for their work on the estate over 13 years … which is a far cry from what she says she and her two brothers have received since their dad died.
articles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，內容主要關於麥可傑克森的女兒Paris Jackson與其遺產執行人之間的法律糾紛。

articles.title: The ad machine: how David Beckham conquered America - The Guardian
articles.snippet: An Australian TV show has already made a funny clip that notes Beckham is basically the hardest working man in America, furiously retailing every moment of his waking life, from morning coffee, to breakfast pancakes and taking a shower in his pants (he’s 52 years old: here is his arse crack); to shopping for DIY stuff, eating grenade-shaped matter for lunch, having a beer, having smouldering thoughts about his watch, driving really fast, presumably to the bar where he is now having to hastily neck whisky, and then turning into some kind of unspecified sun god before falling asleep finally on a really expensive mattress (you don’t see his arse crack). Do people in the UK really know quite how massive he is now, not just as one of the most famous people in America, but in his reach and power?
articles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於大衛·貝克漢在美國的商業影響力與生活片段，並未提及周杰倫。

articles.title: 11 Albums Out This Week You Should Listen to Now - Pitchfork
articles.snippet: # 11 New Albums You Should Listen to Now: Steve Lacy, Syd, and More. Also stream new releases from Helado Tropical and Nia Archives. *With so much good music being released all the time, it can be hard to determine what to listen to first. This week’s batch includes new albums from Steve Lacy, Syd, and more. Subscribe to Pitchfork’s* *New Music Friday newsletter* *to get our recommendations in your inbox every week. Steve Lacy has the ability to channel melancholy, longing, and the first flush of young love through his guitar. “She’s just a nice Irish Catholic lady, living in her castle with her cats and her dogs and her piano.”) But although Enya’s name makes up half of *Caribenya*’s portmanteau title, this is far from a tribute record: it’s a synthesis of the many elements—from dembow to cumbia to classical composition—that the Toronto-based singer and multi-instrumentalist has incorporated into her practice over the years.
articles.summary: 這篇Pitchfork文章推薦了本週發行的11張新專輯，但內容中未提及周杰倫。

articles.title: Carly Rae Jepsen, Gracie Abrams, Steve Lacy & More: New Music Friday Guide - Billboard
articles.snippet: This week: Gracie Abrams shares her anticipated this album, *Daughter From Hell* (read *Billboard*‘s tracks ranked here); Steve Lacy is back with his self-produced third album, *Oh yeah?*; and Carly Rae Jepsen continues her *Day and Night* rollout with the release of the upcoming double album’s second single… plus much more. Gracie Abrams’ third album is finally here, just two years after *The Secret of Us* helped the pop singer emerge as a fast-rising star as the project debuted at No. 2 Billboard 200, bolstered by hit single “That’s So True.” This time, Abrams returned to producer Aaron Dessner’s Long Pond studio to craft the sonically intimate and lyrically expansive *Daughter From Hell*, led by surging singles “Hit the Wall” and “Look at My Life.” Release day focus track “Good Reason” is softer in its contemplation, as Abrams sings of putting herself first.
articles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Carly Rae Jepsen、Gracie Abrams和Steve Lacy等歌手的新音樂發行，內容未提及周杰倫。

articles.title: Jay-Z’s Hit-Packed Yankee Stadium Shows Turned the Ballpark into a Throne Room - GQ
articles.snippet: On “Addicted to the Game,” a fan-favorite *Blueprint*-era loosie, Jay-Z sums up his career with one of my all-time favorite lines of his: “Thoughts are sporadic, I gotta un-confuse it/Sort of like a Rubik’s Cube is/Every album’s a color, but I fuck up the other color.” With 25-odd years of distance, it’s hilarious that he said this at what we now know as merely the halfway point in his discography; like most of his lines, it now holds a more prophetic weight than maybe even he could’ve imagined. Back in January, staring down the barrel of the 30th anniversary of his career, Jay played coy about how much he’d celebrate this milestone, even as he promised a year defined by “all offense.” Fast forward to July, and here he is in a bulletproof vest, standing before his hometown ready to receive love, but also take on all smoke.
articles.summary: 此新聞報導關於美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z的演唱會與職業生涯，與周杰倫無關。

articles.title: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Epic Late Night Show Featuring Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and More - Variety Australia
articles.snippet: “We’re going to go until like 5 a.m., so don’t be scared,” said Jay-Z not long after he started the third and final show of his Yankee Stadium residency on Sunday night, the concluding chapter to a weekend that paid homage to the 25th and 30th anniversaries of his seminal albums “The Blueprint” and “Reasonable Doubt,” respectively. The remark was made around 1 a.m, roughly 40 minutes after he started a concert that had been plagued by hours-long delays as fans waited both inside the stadium and on the perimeter of the venue, stuck in lines that didn’t budge. It was a ceaseless tour of his discography accented and enhanced by a rotating cast of guest artists that, to do justice, is best laid out as a plain list: Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Jermaine Dupri, Pharrell Williams, Clipse, Teyana Taylor, Swizz Beatz, Jeezy, Fat Joe, Jadakiss and The-Dream.
articles.summary: Jay-Z Closes Yankee Stadium Residency With Epic Late Night Show Featuring Beyoncé, Rihanna, Usher, Teyana Taylor and More - Variety Australia

articles.title: Oasis singer Liam Gallagher’s son is bringing his band to San Francisco - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.snippet: # Oasis singer Liam Gallagher’s son is bringing his band to San Francisco. Gene Gallagher, the son of Oasis singer Liam Gallagher, is following his father’s path to San Francisco — but with a heavier sound and a considerably smaller stage. Gallagher’s British rock trio, Villanelle, is scheduled to make its San Francisco debut Wednesday, July 29, at Rickshaw Stop as part of Popscene, the city’s long-running showcase for emerging British and alternative acts. The performance comes nearly 32 years after Oasis made its own San Francisco debut at Bottom of the Hill on Sept. “It’s wild to think that I saw Oasis make their San Francisco debut at Bottom Of The Hill in 1994 and now, 32 years later, I have the opportunity to bring Liam Gallagher’s son’s band Villanelle to the Bay Area for their debut as well,” Axelsen said. Aidin Vaziri is a staff writer and pop music critic at the San Francisco Chronicle.

articles.title: Jay-Z Proved He Is Still The King Of New York, And The Numbers Back It Up - Forbes
articles.snippet: # Jay-Z Proved He Is Still The King Of New York, And The Numbers Back It Up. Forbes contributors publish independent expert analyses and insights. Jay-Z's "JAŸ-Z30" celebration cemented his "King of New York" status, transforming the city into a living tribute to his 30-year legacy. The month-long activation featured a Dumbo exhibit, wrapped subway trains, and an immersive museum, culminating in a record-shattering three-night residency at Yankee Stadium. What began on June 24th as an exhibit dedicated to“JAŸ-Z30” in Brooklyn's Dumbo neighborhood unfolded into a sweeping look at the cultural icon’s journey and legacy across music, fashion, and literature over the past three decades. That tribute for the 30th anniversary of *Reasonable Doubt* became one of the largest artist-driven cultural activations New York has seen in years, culminating in a three-night residency at Yankee Stadium that shattered attendance records and reinforced Jay-Z’s status as the defining artist of New York.

The job is largely focused on foreign threats and national security, but much of the hearing focused instead on the recent past. U.S. attorney Jay Clayton appeared before the Senate Intelligence Committee for his confirmation hearing to become director of national intelligence. Today on Capitol Hill, a hearing that was supposed to be about the future of the intelligence community was instead dominated by the history of the 2020 election. Jay Clayton, U.S. Director of National Intelligence Nominee: I'm not going to do this with you. Jay Clayton is the president's nominee for director of national intelligence, a lawyer with more than 30 years of experience, President Trump's first chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission, and most recently U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York, one of the Justice Department's most prestigious roles.

articles.title: Beyoncé Shaved Off Jay-Z’s Afro at Yankee Stadium - GQ
articles.snippet: # Beyoncé Shaved Off Jay-Z’s Afro at Yankee Stadium. For his three-night stadium run in the Bronx, Jay-Z returned to his roots in more ways than one. In it, Jay is wearing a black-and-white 1996 World Series Yankees jersey, black pants, and Adidas Superstars, sitting in the exact same stadium seats that had sold out for his shows. After wearing freeform locs for nearly a decade, Jay made headlines in June 2026 when he returned to the stage for the first time in seven years to perform at Roots Picnic in Philadelphia, showing off a fresh new afro. A video posted to the YouTube channel of Beyoncé’s haircare brand Cecréd later showed that she and Jay’s daughter Blue pitched in to help comb out the rapper’s hair, too. The crew cut reveal added even more gravitas to Jay’s momentous homecoming, a return to the shorter hairstyle he had in the ‘90s when he was still coming up in the Brooklyn rap game.
articles.summary: 此新聞主要關於Jay-Z的髮型變化，與周杰倫無關。

articles.title: Japanese R&B Artist Nao Yoshioka Embraces Vulnerability On New Album self - Respect My Region
articles.snippet: Japanese R&B and soul artist **Nao Yoshioka** is opening a deeply personal new chapter with the release of her latest album, ***self***. The 12 track album explores identity, healing, and self acceptance while bringing together collaborators from around the world to create one of the **most intimate releases of her career.**. The album reflects different stages of her personal journey, allowing each song to contribute to a larger story of growth and emotional honesty. **Yoshioka** describes the album as a reflection of finally accepting both her strengths and insecurities while expressing gratitude for the people who helped shape her journey. While ***self*** is rooted in Yoshioka’s personal story, the album’s sound is strengthened by an impressive lineup of international collaborators. The release of ***self*** is only part of what promises to be an active year for Yoshioka. With ***self*** now available, listeners can experience **Nao Yoshioka’s** most personal work to date while exploring an album that celebrates vulnerability, growth, and the power of embracing every part of who you are.
articles.summary: 日本R&B歌手Nao Yoshioka發行了新專輯《self》，探索身份、療癒和自我接納，並與國際音樂人合作。

articles.snippet: # Chanel signs singer Gracie Abrams as Coco Mademoiselle Ambassador. Chanel has named the 26-year-old Grammy-nominated artist the face of Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu – the first new scent addition to its Coco Mademoiselle fragrance collection in six years. Chanel has named singer Gracie Abrams the face of its new fragrance Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu. The Grammy-nominated artist will front the newest scent addition to the luxury house’s Coco Mademoiselle collection via a new campaign. Set to launch in August, Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu is the first new addition to Chanel’s Coco Mademoiselle fragrance franchise in six years. Abrams is a 26-year-old singer-songwriter known for hits such as ‘I miss you, I’m sorry’, ‘That’s so true’ and ‘Hit the wall’. *Chanel's Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu*. Commenting on the partnership, Abrams said "it is unreal” to be the new face of Coco Mademoiselle. Abrams follows in the footsteps of actress Whitney Peak, who was named the face of Coco Mademoiselle in 2023 – Chanel’s first-ever black fragrance ambassador.

articles.title: Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. He’s coming back for another show - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.snippet: # Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. The last time Ed Sheeran came to Levi’s Stadium in 2023, he broke the venue’s attendance record. That distinction makes the “Shape of You” singer a fitting act to mark the stadium’s return to its former self. San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, as the venue was temporarily known during its month-long FIFA World Cup hosting stint, went viral when a white tarp covered the Levi’s logo in response to FIFA’s branding restrictions. Sheeran will be the first to perform at the venue since the tarp was removed July 7. He continues to ride the waves of his eighth studio album “Play,” which includes the electropop track “Azizam” and the pop-R&B song “A Little More.”. The four-time Grammy winner brings the Loop Tour to the Bay Area on Saturday, July 25. Desiree Luo is a Datebook intern at the San Francisco Chronicle covering arts and entertainment news. A Bay Area native, Desiree is an avid fan of the Giants, Warriors and 49ers.
articles.summary: Ed Sheeran broke this Bay Area stadium’s attendance record. He’s coming back for another show - San Francisco Chronicle

articles.title: Bruno Mars brings hits, romance and a Paddington Bear to Wembley - BBC
articles.snippet: # Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts. Bruno Mars appeared determined to lift the nation's mood during the first of his six nights at Wembley Stadium. ## 'London, it's time to party'. The show began with a pre-recorded video of Mars praying in a church for a good performance, before he emerged beneath visuals of a stained-glass window in a red suit bejewelled with roses. But for those who had avoided spoilers, Risk It All, a slow R&B ballad from Mars' latest album, The Romantic, was perhaps an unexpected opener. It was an early glimpse of what was to come as he declared: "London, it's time to party.". For his 2010 hit Just the Way You Are, the singer asked for the stadium lights to be turned up so he could see the crowd, revealing thousands of fans singing every word back to him, before Uptown Funk transformed Wembley into a giant dancefloor complete with fireworks and gold confetti.
articles.summary: Bruno Mars brings hits, romance and a Paddington Bear to Wembley - BBC

articles.title: Joe Jackson Makes A New York City Homecoming At Beacon Theatre Show - Forbes
articles.snippet: Joe Jackson concluded the North American leg of his \*Hope and Fury\* tour at New York City's Beacon Theatre, offering a nearly two-hour journey through his almost 50-year career. The veteran singer-songwriter, a long-time NYC resident, masterfully wove new tracks from his latest album, a return to rock and pop, with early New Wave hits like "Is She Going Out With Him?" and "Steppin' Out." Accompanied by his superb band, Jackson's performance highlighted his diverse musical styles—from jazz to Latin—all infused with a distinct New York flavor. For the encore, Jackson and the band returned to pay tribute to David Bowie, another British music legend and one-time New York resident, with an urgent cover of “Scary Monsters (and Super Creeps).” That was followed by the jazzy “You Can’t Get What You Want (Till What You Know Want)," and Jackson concluded the night alone on stage with a soulful and heartfelt performance of “Home Town.”.
articles.summary: Joe Jackson Makes A New York City Homecoming At Beacon Theatre Show - Forbes

articles.title: Your guide to the CAAMP concert at CMAC this week - Democrat and Chronicle
articles.snippet: # Your guide to the CAAMP concert at CMAC this week. CAAMP, whose fifth studio album, "Copper Changes Color," debuted at No.1 on Billboard's Americana/Folk Albums chart, will take the CMAC stage at 7 p.m. on Tuesday, July 21, for their "CAAMP Live in 2026 Tour.". CAAMP will be CMAC's ninth show of the 2026 summer concert season. Tickets for CAAMP's July 21 show currently range from around $52 to $104, and can be purchased through Ticketmaster.com. Doors for the show will open at 5:30 p.m., and the performance will start at 7 p.m. The venue is on the Finger Lakes Community College campus, located at 3355 Marvin Sands Drive, Hopewell. **Premium lot parking:** Tickets for the premium parking lot are $30 and must be purchased in advance through Ticketmaster.com. 周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》於3/25發行，首波同名主打MV耗資近1億元，致敬30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事。數位專輯上線3天狂賣250萬張，吸金4.6億元，創下驚人商業成績。儘管外界評價兩極，但其MV的藝術性與高製作成本均引發熱烈討論，展現歌王霸氣回歸。

周杰倫近期推出新專輯首波主打歌〈太陽之子〉，引發廣泛關注。這支耗資近新台幣一億元打造的MV，不僅在巴黎及台北取景，更巧妙融合了梵谷、克林姆等30幅世界名畫，以吸血鬼懸案故事呈現，並強調拒絕使用AI技術。專輯上線短短三天，數位銷量便突破250萬張，狂吸超過4.6億元，展現驚人吸金實力，並登上iRadio金曲排行榜冠軍。儘管銷售成績亮眼，歌曲評價卻呈現兩極化，部分粉絲讚譽找回早期感動，但也有網友認為「不像以前」或「太像以前」，引發熱烈討論。MV發布會亦吸引萬人觀看，顯示其超高人氣。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》及同名主打歌MV近期成為焦點。MV耗資近億元，結合30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事，並強調未使用AI製作。專輯發行三天已賣破250萬張，狂吸4.6億元。儘管評價兩極，但其製作規模與藝術性仍引發熱議。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》3月25日發行，MV耗資近1億台幣，由好萊塢團隊製作，巧妙融入30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事。專輯上線三天狂賣逾250萬張，吸金4.6億元，創華語MV製作費新高。周杰倫透露靈感源於恐慌經驗，雖評價兩極，但許多粉絲讚其找回早期感動。

analysis_reports.daily_summary: 周杰倫近期新聞不斷，新專輯《太陽之子》的解析引發關注，其原名為「我就是光」。此外，他參與的實境節目將於九月在華航機上影音平台獨家上線。在個人動態方面，周杰倫與昆凌飛往英國，與網球巨星費德勒同框，展現跨界好交情。他也公開力挺周星馳新片，透露兩人深厚友誼。儘管杭州演唱會曾遭質疑「划水」，但他仍抱著小女兒抵京準備鳥巢演唱會，兒子也展現獨立一面。林志穎父子也現身周杰倫演唱會，顯示其高人氣。國台辦也對周杰倫等台灣歌手在大陸舉辦演唱會一事做出回應。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》解析曝光，其實境節目也將於九月登上華航機上影音。他不僅力挺周星馳新片，更在英國與網球傳奇費德勒同框，展現跨界好交情。儘管杭州演唱會被質疑「划水」，但他已抱小女兒抵京準備鳥巢演唱會，林志穎也現身支持。
